R0217.title: XR Device Firmware Attack
R0217.definition: Attackers exploit firmware vulnerabilities in VR/AR headsets, controllers and other XR devices to achieve device control, data theft or malicious code implantation.

references.title: Legal risks in metaverse development: technology and data

R0217.description: Attackers exploit firmware vulnerabilities in VR/AR headsets, controllers and other XR devices to achieve device control, data theft or malicious code implantation.
R0217.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
